summary: Frontend regression for KinnectCare emoji-icon + Location Card refactor. Verified Welcome/Login/Dashboard/Member-Detail/Alerts/Add-Member flows on https://family-guard-37.preview.emergentagent.com at 390x844. All Ionicons replaced with emoji via <Icon> (src/Icon.tsx); zero Ionicons font requests; zero residual Ionicons/@expo/vector-icons imports. Member detail now renders the new Location Card (no OSM staticmap image) with 📍 pin, status dot, location_name, coordinates row, Get Directions button (testID member-get-directions), and 'Live map view coming soon' caption. All listed testIDs work; Get Directions tap does not crash.

issues: RN-Web warnings persist: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow); props.pointerEvents deprecated (use style.pointerEvents) — cosmetic only, carried over from iter 1.

action_items: Optional: migrate shadow*/props.pointerEvents to boxShadow/style.pointerEvents to silence RN-Web warnings (non-blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: src/Icon.tsx is a clean drop-in: wraps emoji in <Text allowFontScaling={false}> with size+color, fallback '•' for unknown names — good.
member/[id].tsx openDirections() uses Platform.select for ios:maps:, android:geo:, web fallback to Google Maps URL — correct; wrapped in Linking.openURL().catch with user-facing Alert.
Brand color tokens consistent with spec: primary #1B5E35, primaryActive #113D22, tertiary #EAF3DE, background #F9F5F0, textPrimary #1A2E20, textSecondary #5A6B5E.
Stale mapCard/mapImg/mapOverlay/mapText/lastSeen styles remain in member/[id].tsx StyleSheet but are no longer referenced — dead code, safe to remove later.

success_rate.backend: not retested (no backend changes in this iter)

seed_data_creation: Reused existing demo@kinnectcare.app/password123 seed; add-member flow added 'Test Member' which now appears on dashboard.
context_for_next_testing_agent: On member detail card, the 'Last seen' label uses CSS textTransform:'uppercase' so Playwright inner_text() returns 'LAST SEEN' (not 'Last seen'). Use case-insensitive matching when asserting. Welcome screen 'Alerts' icon uses alert-circle which maps to 🔔 (bell). Tabs are Family (index 0) and Alerts (index 1) only — no Settings tab in this build.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no failures observed; refactor verified working.
